2605.12061.title: SAGE: A Self-Evolving Agentic Graph-Memory Engine for Structure-Aware Associative Memory
2605.12061.paper_summary: Long-term memory is becoming a central bottleneck for language agents. Exsting RAG and GraphRAG systems largely treat memory graphs as static retrieval middleware, which limits their ability to recover complete evidence chains from partial cues, exploit reusable graph-structrual roles, and improve the memory itself through downstream feedback. We introduce SAGE, a Self-evolving Agentic Graph-memory Engine that models graph memory as a dynamic long-term memory substrate. SAGE couples two roles: a memory writer that incrementally constucts structured graph memory from interaction histories, and a Graph Foundation Model-based memory reader to perform retrieval and provide feedback to the memory writer. We provide rigorooous theoretical annalyses supporting the framework. Across multi-hop QA, open-domain retireval, domain-specific review QA, and long-term agent-memory benchmarks, SAGE improves evidence recovery, answer grounding, and retrieval efficiency: after two self-evolution rounds, it achieves the best average rank on multi-hop QA; in zero-shot open-domain transfer, it reaches 82.5/91.6 Recall@2/5 on NQ. Further results on LongMemEval and HaluMem show that traning and reader-writer feedback improve multiple long-term memory and hallucination-diagnostic metrics, suggesting that self-evolving, structure-aware graph memory is a promising foundation for robust long-horizon language agents.
2605.12061.paper_summary_zh: 長期記憶正成為語言代理的主要瓶頸。現有的 RAG 和 GraphRAG 系統在很大程度上將記憶圖視為靜態檢索中介，這限制了它們從部分提示中恢復完整證據鏈的能力，利用可重用的圖結構角色，以及通過下游反饋來改善記憶本身。我們介紹了 SAGE，一個自我演化的代理圖記憶引擎，將圖記憶建模為動態長期記憶基質。SAGE 結合了兩個角色：一個記憶寫入器，從互動歷史中逐步構建結構化的圖記憶，以及一個基於圖基礎模型的記憶讀取器，執行檢索並向記憶寫入器提供反饋。我們提供了嚴謹的理論分析來支持該框架。在多跳 QA、開放域檢索、特定領域回顧 QA 和長期代理記憶基準測試中，SAGE 改善了證據恢復、答案基礎和檢索效率：經過兩輪自我演化後，它在多跳 QA 上達到了最佳平均排名；在零樣本開放域轉移中，它在 NQ 上達到了 82.5/91.6 Recall@2/5。進一步的 LongMemEval 和 HaluMem 結果顯示，訓練和讀取-寫入反饋改善了多個長期記憶和幻覺診斷指標，這表明自我演化的結構感知圖記憶是穩健的長期語言代理的有希望的基礎。
2605.12061.author: Juntong Wang et.al.
2605.12061.authors: Juntong Wang, Haoyue Zhao, guanghui Pan, Xiyuan Wang, Yanbo Wang, Qiyan Deng, Muhan Zhang
